title: Fix SearchMemoryTool Regex Fragility and Top-Hit Limitation
description:
Council Review Sprint 51 High Priority Task.

Three fixes to SearchMemoryTool.cs:
1. Scan ALL results for first valid coordinate-bearing hit (not just FirstOrDefault)
2. Replace int.Parse with int.TryParse (guarded parsing)
3. Fix CoordLabelsPattern regex to use distinct named groups (x/y/z) instead of single group name "x"

Also: align Sprint51Tests.cs regex patterns with production patterns.

Source: Council Review 2026-06-26, DA-005, Retrieval Specialist findings

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
Council report: Data/Pages/council/audit-findings-consolidation-council-2026-06-26.md

Retrieval Specialist flagged 3 issues: (1) top-hit-only limitation is Critical — bot can miss known resource locations, (2) int.Parse throws on malformed coordinates, (3) CoordLabelsPattern uses single group name "x" for all axes. All three are small, independent fixes.
